case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. DAISY ANDERSON

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033; INTEREST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 (TRANSACTION ID # 17127040) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $249.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 17127040) AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, DAISY AKA DAISY B. ANDERSON

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON, DAISY AKA DAISY B. ANDERSON $2,121.13 PRINCIPAL, $249.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,370.13, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 17127040)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, DAISY AKA DAISY B. ANDERSON DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-20-2017
DISASSOCIATION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 17250071): GRAVES, MISHAELA J REMOVED AS ATTORNEY FOR MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100025465) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100026816), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED FEB-14-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE FEB-16-2017 AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, DAISY AKA DAISY B. ANDERSON

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-09-2017 CONTINUED TO OCT-03-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAY-09-2017 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 17127040) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-03-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 17127040) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-09-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
